---
name: Bug report
about: Something in the documentation, templates, or adapters is wrong or broken
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What is wrong

A clear and short description of the problem.

## Where

- File: `path/to/file.md`
- Section / line (if relevant):

## What I expected

What you thought the document or template should say or do.

## What actually happened

What you actually got, including any error message if you ran a copy-paste command.

## Environment (only if relevant)

- Agent / platform:
- OS:
- Version of this repository (commit hash or tag):

## Additional context

Anything else that helps reproduce or explain the issue.
